history.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Can you go ahead and tell me the the status of codex on vs code - its open on my computer, tell me if its still coding or if it finished
I’ll take a look at Codex in VS Code and get back to you shortly with its current status.
I’ll take a look at Codex in VS Code and get back to you shortly with its current status.

It looks like that happened because the Codex request triggered an OpenAI Codex API error 400 with the message starting “Inval…,” which usually means the request was invalid in some way; reviewing the prompt/parameters and retrying should resolve it.
